descriptors: I am a young priest who chose to take holy vows to avoid a life of struggle. I am a scholar of alchemy and distillation, but I do not shy away from the pleasures of life.
agenda: Accumulate wealth through absinthe smuggling and then flee across the ocean to rebuild my life in the new world
system.background: A young priest at the church of Saint Pierre in Paris who appears tired and worried, with swollen eyes from lack of sleep. Adrien distills absinthe in his church cellars and smuggles it through the catacombs. He murdered little Yvonne when she discovered his illegal laboratory - he strangled her unconscious, set her on fire, and threw her remains in the catacombs. Now haunted by nightmares of Yvonne's death and visions of Paris burning. Yvonne's spirit is systematically killing all those who witnessed her death but stayed silent, saving Adrien for last. A heavy trap door connects the cellars to the catacombs where he passes absinthe to his henchmen (the Ravens).
system.notes: The main antagonist whose crime started everything. Will call the Hunters to investigate, hoping they stop Yvonne before she reaches him. If confronted, will collapse in tears and reveal his recurring nightmares. Knows about the comet Morituris and fears the New Year.

flags.inspiration: The Little Match Girl (Hans Christian Andersen)
